questions.q: The Vedic period is characterized by the rise of which of the following?
The Aryans brought with them their own system of governance, which was based on the principle of?
The concept of 'Dharma' and 'Artha' in ancient India is closely related to the ideas of?
Compare and contrast the social system of the Vedic period and the Mauryan period.
questions.answer: The social system of the Vedic period was characterized by a tribal society, whereas the Mauryan period saw the rise of a varna-based society.

questions.q: The concept of 'Ashramas' in ancient India refers to?

The Aryans introduced the concept of?

Compare and contrast the social system of the Mauryan period and the Gupta period.
questions.answer: The Mauryan period saw the rise of a varna-based society, whereas the Gupta period saw the rise of a more complex social hierarchy.
